title: Design reviewed queue reconcile apply path
goal: Define and implement a guarded apply path for queue-reconcile recommendations so now/next lane promotions can be applied only from a reviewed plan artifact.

metadata.source: Registered after PR #253 intentionally shipped queue-reconcile as read-only only.
metadata.safety_boundary: No automatic promotion. Apply must require reviewed plan evidence, current registry hash, dry-run parity and doctor/registry-truth gates.
metadata.outcome: Reviewed queue-reconcile apply is implemented and postflight-verified. Apply now binds the reviewed artifact to the same registry root, non-empty Git head, pre-apply queue hash, current dry-run report and exactly re-derived safe actions; head drift around the effect boundary fails closed or rolls back byte-exactly. Empty action sets are byte-stable explicit no-ops.

head_drift_refusal.message: registry git head changed since queue reconcile plan was generated

validation: PR #344 and PR #449 passed GitHub validate (3.10) and validate (3.12).
Ruff over src and tests passed.
The complete local pytest suite passed.
Bureau check passed with state-store integrity ok and no foreign-key errors.
Doctor and Registry Truth were healthy with zero lifecycle, queue or workspace findings.
A real temporary-Git add-to-next apply passed all post gates with a minimal readable queue diff.
No-op and head-drift smokes left queue bytes unchanged.

verified_acceptance.reviewed-plan-required: Apply requires review.status=reviewed plus reviewer and reviewed_at, enforces the same registry root and a non-empty exact Git head, and verifies the expected queue/hash.
verified_acceptance.dry-run-parity: Apply recomputes the current report, compares its canonical hash, derives current safe actions again, requires exact action-list equality, and recomputes the expected queue. Coherently tampered action/queue pairs and head drift are refused.
verified_acceptance.gates-after-apply: After a real queue write, state integrity, Doctor and Registry Truth must all pass; head drift is checked again after gates, and every post-write failure restores the original queue bytes.
verified_acceptance.no-implicit-dispatch: The apply result and code retain explicit non-claims for dispatch, task claim, task completion and merge readiness; tests and live smoke perform no such effect.

acceptance.assertion: Apply mode requires an explicit reviewed plan artifact with expected queue diff and registry head.
Apply refuses if dry-run findings changed since the reviewed plan was generated.
bureau check, doctor and registry-truth must pass after any queue mutation.
Applying a queue change does not claim or dispatch work.
